note: Off-script sync. CouchPotatoServer is a server-rendered htmx+Alpine+Tailwind app, NOT a React component library, so there is no compiled component bundle. This project carries design TOKENS (docs/design-system/theme.css surface/text vars + materialised brand colours) and GUIDELINES (docs/design-system/README.md + CONFORMANCE.md + screenshots) only. No _ds_bundle.js / components / _ds_sync.json. Re-sync: rebuild ds-bundle/ from docs/design-system/, then re-upload (no anchor, so it always re-uploads).
